name: Lebanon County Rhubarb Jam
recipeIngredient: 2 each Orange, rind and juice of
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and peel the rhubarb and cut into small pieces.
2. Add sugar and 1/2 cup cold water to a pot.
3. Grate the rinds of the oranges and add them to the rhubarb mixture.
4. Add the orange juice.
5. Cook for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Pour into sterilized jars and seal.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
